raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX a company called XXXX also known as XXXX posed as an agent of XXXX XXXX XXXX. We called their toll free number thinking we were calling XXXX Directly based on a search did online. They promissed to pay XXXX the {$2900.00} US they charged our Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX. This was never done. 

We disputed the charge with Barclays and they opened a dispute. I sent them information and an email chain from XXXX where they promised initially to process the payment to our XXXX account and then later verbally told me they would refund the amount, Niether of these happened.

I received a notice from Barclays Dispute department that they had ruled in favor of the merchant. I then provided them with additional information the way of my current XXXX XXXX account showing that since the date in XXXX until mid XXXX they have not paid the {$2900.00} they agreed to pay.

Searches on the internet show these two companies be fraudulent which I also provided to Barlcays. I have called them to reopen the case but it does not appear that they have done this. Clearly the service was never provided by XXXX and I want the charge removed from my card and the case re-poened.
